task_completion.description: Crawl the target website using Screaming Frog SEO Spider
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog SEO Spider application is open with 'https://crawler-test.com/' entered in the URL bar at the top, and the crawl progress bar shows completion or active crawling.

task_completion.description: Export the security data to the specified CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file manager showing 'security_tab_export.csv' being saved to or existing in the '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Export the internal data to the specified CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file manager showing 'internal_all_export.csv' being saved to or existing in the '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create the security audit report text file in the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing a file named 'security_audit_report.txt' saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Include total URL count, HTTP/HTTPS breakdown, mixed content, and HSTS assessment in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text inside the report file includes numeric data representing URL counts, a comparison of HTTP vs HTTPS, and explicit mentions/assessments of 'mixed content' and 'HSTS'.

task_completion.description: Include at least 3 remediation recommendations and ensure sufficient report length
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report contains at least 3 distinct recommendations (e.g., numbered list, bullet points, or keywords like 'recommend', 'fix', 'remediation') and visually appears to be at least a few paragraphs long (minimum 400 characters).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the crawl and exports
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Screaming Frog application interface (menus, export buttons, crawl buttons) rather than just terminal commands creating the files.

integrity.description: Verify the report contains genuine analysis rather than copy-pasted prompt instructions
integrity.visual_evidence: The report should contain actual numbers and specific findings related to crawler-test.com, not just a copy-paste of the task description or placeholder text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a text editor to create the report
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano, or mousepad) should be visible with the report contents being typed or formatted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://crawler-test.com/. Security export path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/security_tab_export.csv. Internal export path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/internal_all_export.csv. Report path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/security_audit_report.txt. The report must be at least 400 characters long. It must contain numeric data, keywords related to (mixed content OR hsts), and action keywords (recommend OR fix OR remediation).
